title: Dungeons and Combat
description: RPG mod set in adventure and the need to be all-powerful
body:
Mod Showcase











https://discord.gg/9aRqar8wCY
Features
Dungeons and combat is an RPG mod that adds different structures with their own themes, where we will find, The followers of Eldrich, The Bloody Cult, The children of the Sun and The beings of Blaze, each represented by a mini boss.
There is also a new class system, this will not affect the gameplay but when choosing a class it will define your attributes and grant you a passive.

Many of these locations you will find in the Overworld or the Nether, also in the caves you will find new materials to make new equipment with armor designed in 3D and adding 3 types of weapons for each material, these being Light, Medium and Heavy each with its advantages and disadvantages.
Remember that this mod is made in Mcreator, it also has 2 mandatory mods being these
Geckolib
and
Curios API.



Class System



Choosing a class will affect the way each player fights, adding restrictions and passive abilities with
custom attributes for each class.



Vagabond:

The Vagabond does not stand out in any area, it is simply the vanilla statistics of the player


Rogue:

The Rogue Class focuses on fast attacks, with increased mobility and the ability to cast invisible while crouching, with the disadvantage of having less health than normal



Bounty Hunter:

The Bounty Hunter, being a mercenary, has a greater probability of looting in addition to having half his health and gaining Strength.



Forgotten Knight:

The Forgotten Knight Class focuses on a heavier style, with increased damage in its attacks and thanks to its willpower, having half its health will gain Resistance.



Titan:

The Titan is the toughest class in the mod, having increased health, but being slower, the titan is also immune to negative combat effects such as "Mining Fatigue", "Weakness" and "Slowness".



Oni Slayer:

The Oni Slayer is an agile samurai who has the ability to give the mark of death to his enemies, a state that when finished will do additional damage to his victim.



Exiled:

Expelled from the academies of magic, the Exiled was compensated with a special scepter of souls that allows him to give great dashes and fire magical arrows, having as a passive an increase in his magical attacks.

 



 Structures and Dungeons

The Catacumbs Lugubrious:

A small labyrinth full of skeletal enemies where "Kamath", Eldrich's right hand, lives.



Forgotten Sands:
A great pyramid that awaits the entities that praise the sun where you will find Sunleia, a semi-bird goddess with solar powers.





The Cathedral:

The refuge of the Blood Cultists who worship the god of blood and death where you will find the powerful Monarch.



The Blazing Fortress:

The palace of infernal entities, where its guardians live



The field of the fallen:

A graveyard guarding the Gravewatcher with valuable loot to loot




Ores and Tools

The mod adds more than 20 3D designed armors with a unique style along with passive abilities that will help you in combat.



Items

Dungeons and Combat has a wide variety of gadgets, accessories, blocks and tools that will help you in your adventure.
Images of some mobs from the mod (not updated)

Frequently Asked Questions

Will the mod be for Fabric?
Nope
Why do armors bug or textures not load?
You're most likely using "Optifine," which isn't very compatible with the 3D Armor; you could use Oculus instead.

How do I remove the class I already chose?

with the following command: /advancement revoke @a only dungeons_and_combat:origin and /advancement revoke @a only dungeons_and_combat:(the class you chose) or you can simply delete all your achievements
Is the mod configurable? Can I remove or change the Class in the mod?
No, none of these are possible since this mod is made in Mcreator which limits some capabilities, there are alternatives but I am not very expert on the subject
